sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
  0: 00000000:0035 00000000:0000 07 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000   1000        0 44444 2 0000000000000000 0
  1: 0100007F:1509 00000000:0000 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000   1000        0 44445 2 0000000000000000 0
